subject: $15,961/month with a $9 tool
body:
Yesterday I mentioned that you don't need anything expensive to win.

To break beliefs about this, let me prove it to you.

Real Skool results from people who started with just the platform:

- Cologne reviewer: Sells perfume through a free group
- Gym equipment expert: Sells equipment through a free group
- Acting Lessons: $15,961/month
- Calligraphy Teacher: $7,157/month

To be clear, their results are not typical. The average group that made at least $1 in the last 30 days, averaged $2100*.

This is not a guarantee of income. Your results will vary.

But, they just had the right platform to execute.

Here's what they had access to:

A platform where everything works together. Content, community, payments, calendar - no juggling 15 different tools trying to make them talk to each other.

Every business money model pre-built. Subscriptions, one-time offers, trials, memberships - just add your knowledge and start collecting money.

BUT...Here's what you're getting that they didn't:

- All the Money Models content organized inside Skool for easy consumption.
- Exclusive training I filmed on how to use each business model with the platform.
- 90 days completely free to build your business.
- Then just $9/month

This combination only exists during my book launch - it ends Saturday 8/23 at 11:59pm PT.

skool.com/hormozi

(48hrs left before 7x free time disappears)

Alex

PS - I want to be clear - the $100M Money Models course and audiobook are both available for free - no optin or purchase necessary - on my site and on my podcast. So if you don't want to sign up for a free trial - all good. You can still get the goods.
